seo.title: Care Staffing Agency in Lambeth | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Dependable, CQC-compliant care staffing across Lambeth — healthcare assistants, support workers, live-in carers, and emergency cover. Available 24/7.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.sub: Vigil Care Staffing supplies vetted, DBS-checked healthcare assistants, support workers and night-shift cover to care providers across Lambeth and south London.
fields.heading: Care Staffing Agency in Lambeth
fields.image_alt: Healthcare assistant from a care staffing agency supporting a resident in a Lambeth care home

fields.body:
Lambeth reaches from Waterloo and Kennington down through Brixton, Clapham, Stockwell and Streatham, and its care homes, supported living schemes and community services depend on reliable staffing to run safely. When a rota gap appears, Vigil Care Staffing supplies vetted care-sector workers who can cover the shift and keep resident care consistent. We place healthcare assistants, support workers and healthcare cleaners with providers across the borough.

We are a care-staffing agency, not a regulated care provider, so our focus is filling rota gaps reliably for the managers who run Lambeth's services. Every worker we supply is directly employed, DBS-checked and matched to the role and setting you need covered. Lambeth is part of our wider coverage across Greater London, so cover for a home in Streatham or Brixton can draw on a responsive local network.
fields.heading: Dependable care staffing for Lambeth

items.body: Rota gaps in Lambeth can appear with little warning, so we respond quickly to short-notice and same-day requests and place a suitable worker as soon as availability is confirmed.
items.title: Rapid response times

items.body: We understand the spread of care settings across Lambeth, from nursing homes near Streatham to supported living around Brixton and Clapham, and match staff who can travel across the borough reliably.
items.title: Local Lambeth knowledge

items.body: For Lambeth homes that need the same workers on repeat shifts, we aim to send people who already know your residents and routines, supporting smoother handovers and steady care.
items.title: Continuity of care

items.body: We match each Lambeth request to a worker with the right experience, whether that is dementia support, learning-disability care or general healthcare assistant duties.
items.title: Specialist matching

items.body: Every worker supplied to a Lambeth provider is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified and referenced before their first shift, following a CQC-aligned process that supports your own staffing records.
items.title: Compliance-conscious vetting

fields.body: Our coverage runs across the whole of Lambeth, including Brixton, Clapham, Streatham, Vauxhall, Stockwell, Kennington and the Waterloo end of the borough. Because Lambeth sits within our broader Greater London network, we can draw on nearby workers when a borough rota tightens at short notice. From residential and nursing homes to supported living schemes, rehabilitation centres and community services, we supply the care-sector staff Lambeth providers need close to where they are needed.
fields.heading: Care staffing across Lambeth and surrounding areas
fields.image_alt: Support workers from a care staffing agency supporting a Lambeth care home during a shift

items.a: Yes. We supply care staff across Lambeth, including Brixton, Clapham, Streatham, Vauxhall, Stockwell and Kennington, as part of our wider coverage across Greater London.
items.q: Do you cover the whole of Lambeth?

items.a: We prioritise short-notice and same-day requests and place a suitable worker as soon as we can confirm availability. Contacting us early gives us the best chance of covering your Lambeth shift.
items.q: How quickly can you fill a shift in Lambeth?

items.a: We supply healthcare assistants, support workers and healthcare cleaners for care homes, nursing homes, supported living schemes, rehabilitation centres and community services across Lambeth.
items.q: What roles can you supply in Lambeth?

items.a: Yes. We cover short-notice temporary rota gaps and also provide longer placements when a Lambeth provider needs ongoing support.
items.q: Do you offer temporary and permanent care staff?
